name: WebGPU Render Pipeline
description: A WebGPU render pipeline with adapter/device init, shader module (WGSL), vertex buffers, bind groups, render pass, and resize handling. Targets raw WebGPU API for maximum control.

requiredElements.name: shader-module
requiredElements.description: WGSL shader module with @vertex and @fragment entry points.

requiredElements.name: vertex-buffer
requiredElements.description: Vertex buffer with createBuffer, writeBuffer, and attribute layout.

requiredElements.name: render-pass
requiredElements.description: Command encoder, beginRenderPass, setPipeline, setBindGroup, draw, submit.

optionalElements.name: uniform-buffer
optionalElements.description: Uniform buffer for MVP matrix with writeBuffer per frame.

optionalElements.name: bind-group
optionalElements.description: Bind group layout + bind group for uniform binding.

optionalElements.name: texture-sampling
optionalElements.description: Texture and sampler for textured rendering.

qualityRules.description: navigator.gpu, adapter, device all null-guarded with fallback.
WGSL compiles; braces balanced; entry points match pipeline.
Buffers and textures destroyed when no longer needed.
No buffer creation in render loop; reuse command encoder pattern.
Depth buffer enabled for correct 3D occlusion.
Output is visually correct — no garbage pixels, correct aspect ratio.
Pipeline descriptor is typed and structured, not a giant inline object.

antiPatterns.description: navigator.gpu used without null check — crashes on unsupported browsers.
Creating buffers inside the render loop — GPU memory leak + stalls.
Canvas doesn't resize — content stretches or clips on window resize.
No depth buffer — 3D objects render in submission order, not depth order.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add uniform buffer for camera matrix to enable 3D camera control.
Add depth24plus depth-stencil attachment for correct occlusion.
Add texture sampling for textured surfaces.

exampleOutputs.label: WebGPU init with guards
